---
author: ""
header-includes:
   - \usepackage{rotating}
   - \usepackage{float}
   - \usepackage{natbib}
   - \usepackage{booktabs}
   - \usepackage{multirow}
geometry: "left=1cm,right=1cm,top=0.9cm,bottom=1.2cm"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    citation_package: natbib
    keep_tex: true
    number_sections: true
#bibliography: ref.bib
link-citations: yes
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
library(pandoc)
options(xtable.comment = FALSE)
library(reshape)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(naniar)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)
library(xtable)
library(pracma)
library(fs)
# library(rstudioapi)
library(this.path)

# set working directory to be the root of the code
setwd(this.path::this.dir())
for (stock_base in c("all", "large")){
  # regression results
  data <- readRDS(paste0("../../tmp/portfolio_results/", stock_base,
                         "/statistics/newey_west/remove_20pct_stk_FALSE.RDS")) %>%
    filter(var_type == "total") %>%
    filter(hor_idx %in% 1:5) %>%
    filter(!grepl("combined_", var)) %>%
    mutate(coef = 100 * coef, se = 100 * se, hor_lab = paste0(from_hor, " $\\rightarrow$ ", to_hor)) %>%
    select(var, coef, se, hor_lab, hor_idx) %>%
    setDT()
  
  # order the variables
  tmp <- readRDS(paste0("../../tmp/processed_signals/", stock_base,
                        "/signal_availability.RDS")) %>%
    group_by(var, var_lab) %>%
    summarize(first_ym = min(yyyymm), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(first_ym) %>%
    setDT() %>%
    mutate(var = gsub("_ret", "", var)) %>%
    mutate(var = ifelse(var == "indu", "industry", ifelse(var == "tec", "tech", var))) %>%
    bind_rows(., data.table(var = "combined", var_lab = "Combined predictor", first_ym = 0)) %>%
    arrange(first_ym) %>%
    mutate(var_idx = row_number()) %>%
    select(-first_ym)
  data <- merge(data, tmp, by = "var")
  rm(tmp)
  
  # add stars
  cuts <- abs(qnorm(c(.01, .05, .1) / 2))
  data[, abs_tstat := abs(coef / se)]
  data[, ss := ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[1], 3, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[2], 2, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[3], 1, 0)))]
  data[, coef_lab := paste0("$", sprintf("%.2f", coef))]
  data[, ss_lab := sapply(data[, ss], function(x) {
    ifelse(x > 0,
      paste0("^{", strcat(rep("*", x)), "}$"),
      "$"
    )
  })]
  data[, coef_lab := paste0(coef_lab, ss_lab)]
  data[, ss_lab := NULL]
  
  est <- cast(data[, list(var_idx, hor_idx, coef_lab)], var_idx ~ hor_idx)
  est[is.na(est)] <- ""
  
  se <- cast(data[, list(var_idx, hor_idx, se)], var_idx ~ hor_idx) %>%
    dplyr::mutate_at(vars(2:6), ~ paste0("$(", sprintf("%.2f", round(., 2)), ")$")) %>%
    select(-var_idx)
  
  tbl <- data.table(bind_cols(est, se))
  rm(est, se)
  
  # add col columns
  col_names <- data.table(t(as.data.frame(c("", paste0("(", 1:10, ")")))))
  names(col_names) <- names(tbl)
  tbl <- rbind(col_names, tbl)
  rm(col_names)
  
  # get labels right
  tbl[, var_idx := c("", unique(data[, .(var_lab, var_idx)][order(var_idx)])[, var_lab])]
  pp <- unique(data[, .(hor_idx, hor_lab)])[order(hor_idx)][, hor_lab]
  tt <- data.table(t(as.data.frame(c("Horizon:", pp, pp))))
  names(tt) <- names(tbl)
  tbl <- rbind(tt, tbl)
  rm(tt, pp)
  
  align_vector <- paste0("ll", paste0(rep("c", times = ncol(tbl) - 1), collapse = ""))
  x.side <- xtable(tbl, align = align_vector)
  
  this_add_to_row <- list(
    pos = list(0, 1, 1, 2, nrow(tbl)),
    command = c(
      "\\toprule & \\multicolumn{5}{c}{Cumulative returns (\\%)} & \\multicolumn{5}{c}{Standard error (\\%)} \\\\\n \\cmidrule(l){2-6} \\cmidrule(l){7-11}",
      "\\cmidrule(l){2-6} \\cmidrule(l){7-11}",
      rep("\\vspace{5pt}", 2),
      "\\bottomrule \n"
    )
  )
  cat("The stock base is:", stock_base)
  print(x.side,
    type = "latex",
    table.placement = "!ht",
    include.rownames = FALSE,
    include.colnames = FALSE,
    tabular.environment = "tabular",
    caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
    hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
    floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
    sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
    add.to.row = this_add_to_row
  )
  out_dir <- paste0(stock_base, "/")
  dir_create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  print(x.side,
    type = "latex",
    table.placement = "!ht",
    include.rownames = FALSE,
    include.colnames = FALSE,
    tabular.environment = "tabular",
    caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
    hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
    floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
    sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
    add.to.row = this_add_to_row,
    file = paste0(stock_base, "/reversal_nw.tex")
  )
}
```
